mapper.select:
select * from pf_equipment
equipment_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or equipment_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
order by create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into pf_equipment(equipment_no, equipment_name, category, purchase_date, status, location, create_time, update_time) values(#{equipmentNo}, #{equipmentName}, #{category}, #{purchaseDate}, 'NORMAL', #{location}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update pf_equipment set status = #{status}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
